Author: grimgrum (soft-target fork by Sushii-dev)
Name: Action Camera (Soft Target)
Description: Fork of grimgrum's Action Camera. Cone writes MouseOverTarget (yellow outline) + SoftTarget (red ring) each frame instead of clobbering the hard target. Pairs with ReAction stacks using Field Target or Soft Target priority. Hold a key to capture the mouse, rotate the camera freely, and auto-face your character.
